asset.title: Review Approve
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: Excellent walkthrough demonstrating human-in-the-loop review and approval of agent proposals on a spreadsheet. The flow is clear, visually polished, and highly credible.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly shows toggling off 'Auto-allow' to force agent edits into a reviewable proposal state.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the entire loop: disabling auto-allow, triggering the agent, viewing cell proposals, and accepting them.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode UI with distinct orange proposal badges that stand out clearly on the spreadsheet cells.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the spreadsheet-plus-agent workspace paradigm of NodeRoom.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic capture of the UI responding to agent actions and user approval clicks.

legibility.evidence: Captions and cell values are highly legible, though some trace logs are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Crucial feature for financial and enterprise use cases where direct agent writes must be audited.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the proposal state and the manual step required to commit changes.

observedEvidence: Agent execution with proposal badges on cells
Accept all button interaction committing the values
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Toggle off auto-allow to review and approve agent spreadsheet edits before they are committed.
